title: salix × princeps-ourayi
intro: Salix × princeps-ourayi, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis, a type of flowering plant in the willow family. The bark, leaves, and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Salix × princeps-ourayi include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds.
